tasks.title: Build the website into the three different pieces that it needs to support. .
tasks.description:
1. Custom AI Development
2. Selling Products
3. Referral to watchmebuildai.com
tasks.plan:
## Overview

Build MojoAiStudio.com as three distinct sub-sites: /products (marketplace with Stripe), /development (custom services intake), /WatchAI (learning referral to watchmebuildai.com). All share consistent navigation, branding, and single-user authentication. Repurpose existing catalog structure from current index.html into /products marketplace page. Simplify root landing page to introduce the three pathways. Marketplace uses static product data and client-side shopping cart. Development services capture briefs via custom email endpoint. Learning path redirects to external watchmebuildai.com with referral tracking.

## Phases

1. Foundation & Infrastructure (6 tasks) — Deploy pipeline, folder structure, simplify root landing page, extract shared nav/footer, Stripe setup, email endpoint
2. Products Marketplace (6 tasks) — Product data, refactor existing catalog into /products, detail pages, shopping cart, Stripe checkout, confirmation
3. Development Services (4 tasks) — Services landing, brief form, email integration, confirmation
4. Learning Referral (3 tasks) — WatchAI landing, CTAs to watchmebuildai.com, referral tracking
5. Testing & Deployment (4 tasks) — End-to-end testing, Stripe verification, form testing, MochaHost deployment

## Key Implementation Detail

Reuse existing HTML/CSS patterns: the current index.html has a well-structured catalog interface (category buttons, facet panel, catalog layout). Instead of building from scratch, move this structure to /products/index.html and wire it to dynamic product data from products.json. Simplify root landing page to core navigation and three prominent CTAs.

## First Proof Unit

Navigation header and footer deployed — All three sub-sites display consistent header with three nav links (Products | Development | Learn) and footer with shared branding. UI check: open each site, DevTools inspection confirms header/footer present on all three.

proofUnits.title: Navigation header and footer deployed
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: All three sub-sites (/products, /development, /WatchAI) display consistent header with three nav links and footer with shared branding.
proofUnits.exactCommand: Open MojoAiStudio.com/products, /development, /WatchAI in browser. DevTools (F12) → Elements tab. Inspect header — confirm three nav links. Scroll to footer — confirm present. Repeat for each site.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Header does not exist; pages are unstyled or have inconsistent navigation.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Header with three nav links visible on all three pages; footer with matching styling present.

proofUnits.title: Product listing page loads and displays products
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Navigate to MojoAiStudio.com/products and see product cards with name, price, description, and 'View Details' link.
proofUnits.exactCommand: Open MojoAiStudio.com/products. Wait for load (check Network tab). Inspect for product cards with: name, price, description, 'View Details' button. Count cards, confirm match with products.json. Click card to navigate to detail page.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Page is blank; products don't load; data not wired to UI.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: At least 3 product cards visible with all required fields; clicking navigates to detail page.

proofUnits.title: Shopping cart persists across browser sessions
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Add product to cart, close browser, reopen, and cart still contains the product.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/products
2. Add product to cart
3. Verify cart displays item
4. Close browser completely
5. Reopen and navigate to MojoAiStudio.com/products
6. Check cart — confirm product still there
7. DevTools (F12) → Application → Local Storage → confirm 'cart' key exists
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Cart is empty after closing and reopening browser.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Product remains in cart; localStorage contains cart data with at least one item.

proofUnits.title: Stripe checkout integration works in test mode
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Add product to cart, checkout with test card (4242 4242 4242 4242), receive success confirmation with order number.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/products, add to cart, proceed to checkout
2. Confirm Stripe payment form loads
3. Enter test card: 4242 4242 4242 4242, future expiry (12/26), CVC 123
4. Click 'Pay'
5. Verify payment succeeds
6. Confirm order confirmation page shows order number and items
7. Check Stripe Dashboard → Payments — confirm test payment appears
8. Check browser console (F12 → Console) — no JavaScript errors
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Stripe form doesn't load; payment fails; confirmation page doesn't appear.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Successful test payment in Stripe Dashboard; order confirmation page displays; no console errors.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: Requires manual testing with Stripe test environment.

proofUnits.title: Development brief form submits and email is delivered
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Fill out /development form, submit, receive confirmation, and admin@MojoAiStudio.com receives email with submission details.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/development
2. Fill form with sample data (project name, scope, timeline, budget)
3. Click 'Submit'
4. Verify no client-side errors (check Network tab for successful POST)
5. Confirm confirmation page displays ('Thank you...')
6. Check admin@MojoAiStudio.com inbox — verify email received with submitted data
7. Check SPAM folder — confirm email not filtered
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Form doesn't submit; confirmation page doesn't appear; email not received.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Form submits successfully; confirmation page appears; email arrives in inbox with all data.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: Manual testing required; email delivery depends on external service.

proofUnits.title: WatchAI landing page displays and CTAs work
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Navigate to MojoAiStudio.com/WatchAI and see educational content with CTAs that redirect to watchmebuildai.com.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/WatchAI
2. Verify page content loads (educational overview text visible)
3. Inspect for CTA buttons — confirm at least 2 CTAs present
4. Click CTA — verify browser redirects to watchmebuildai.com
5. DevTools Network tab → click CTA → verify URL contains watchmebuildai.com and referral parameters
6. Confirm no 404 errors
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Page is blank; CTAs don't exist; CTAs don't redirect to watchmebuildai.com.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Page displays educational content; at least 2 working CTAs redirect to watchmebuildai.com; no 404 errors.

proofUnits.title: All three sites deployed to MochaHost via GitHub
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Push code to main branch, and all three sites are live with latest code within 2 minutes.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Make a small test change (e.g., update footer text)
2. Commit and push: git add . && git commit -m 'test: verify deployment' && git push origin main
3. Check GitHub Actions (repo → Actions tab) — confirm workflow runs and succeeds
4. Wait 1-2 minutes for MochaHost deployment
5. Open the updated page in browser
6. Verify test change is visible (search page source or inspect element)
7. Confirm no errors in GitHub Actions log
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: GitHub Actions workflow doesn't exist or fails; MochaHost doesn't update; test change not visible.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: GitHub Actions succeeds; test change appears on live site within 2 minutes; no deployment errors.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: Manual verification of deployment pipeline required.

tasks.title: Set up Polar.sh account and activate product checkout
tasks.description: Create Polar.sh account and organization, create all 12 products/bundles with monthly pricing, and replace all POLAR_*_PRICE_ID placeholder values in products/index.html and products/data/products.json so that Subscribe buttons open the Polar checkout overlay.

proofUnits.title: Polar.sh org and 12 products created
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Polar.sh dashboard shows organization 'mojo-ai-studio' with 12 products (9 individual + 3 bundles), each with a monthly price and a Price ID.
proofUnits.exactCommand: Log in to polar.sh → Dashboard → Products. Confirm all 12 products exist with correct names and monthly pricing.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: No organization or products exist in Polar.sh.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: 12 products visible in Polar.sh dashboard with Price IDs copied.

proofUnits.title: Subscribe buttons open Polar checkout overlay
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Click any Subscribe button on MojoAiStudio.com/products — Polar checkout overlay appears with the correct product name and price.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/products
2. Click Subscribe on any app card
3. Confirm Polar checkout overlay opens (not a page redirect)
4. Verify product name and price match the card
5. Check browser console — no errors
6. Repeat for one bundle Subscribe button
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Nothing happens on Subscribe click (placeholder Price ID has no Polar product).
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Polar checkout overlay opens with correct product; no console errors.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: Requires Polar.sh account and products to be created first (PU1).

tasks.title: Live test development brief form on MochaHost
tasks.description: Submit the /development brief form on the live MojoAiStudio.com server and verify the full email flow: form submits successfully, confirmation page appears, admin email arrives at admin@MojoAiStudio.com with all submitted data, and auto-reply arrives at the submitter's inbox.

proofUnits.title: Form submits and confirmation page appears
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Filling all required fields and clicking Submit redirects to /development/pages/confirmation.html with no errors.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/development → click 'Start a project'
2. Fill: Project Name, Contact Name, Contact Email (use ravenshroud@gmail.com), Problem Description
3. Click Submit
4. DevTools Network tab → confirm POST /api/submit-brief returns 200 with {"ok":true}
5. Confirm browser redirects to /development/pages/confirmation.html
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: POST returns 500 or network error; page doesn't redirect.

proofUnits.title: Admin email and auto-reply both delivered
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: admin@MojoAiStudio.com receives brief email with all submitted fields; submitter receives auto-reply.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. After PU1 form submission
2. Check admin@MojoAiStudio.com inbox — confirm email with subject 'New Project Brief' containing submitted data
3. Check SPAM folder if not in inbox
4. Check ravenshroud@gmail.com inbox — confirm auto-reply received
5. Verify Reply-To on admin email points to submitter address
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: No email received; email in spam; fields missing from email body.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Both emails arrive in inbox with correct content and addressing.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: If email goes to spam, note MochaHost server reputation issue and consider adding SPF/DKIM records.
